description.value:
You have spent time working in zero gravity and are able to keep your stomach even when floating freely. The interior of asteroids or ships that have lost power are easily navigable for you.

You can use your legs to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Push Off] while in zero-g without needing a free hand. You can ignore the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Clumsy] and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] penalties while @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Untethered] in zero gravity.
